summary: Sprint 5 UX Refinement testing complete. All 9 test cases PASSED. Verified: (1) P0 Feed page loads activities without infinite skeleton - 8 activities rendered in ~15s, (2) P1 Feed in primary nav sidebar between Team and Quotes, (3) P1 Dashboard Control Tower with Action Cards (Change Requests, Pending Invoices, Pending Quotes) and KPI strip (Total Clients, Active Projects, Revenue, Approved Quotes), (4) P1 Action Cards clickable and route correctly, (5) P2 Billing page has no Sync button and no duplicate Subscription Details, (6) P2 Settings > Billing tab shows plan summary with Manage Billing redirect button, (7) Manage Billing button navigates to /agent/billing, (8) Feed activity cards render with title, author, type badge, recipients count, (9) Dashboard Recent Activity is deduplicated.
critical_code_review_comments: Feed.js: N+1 query fix verified - activities come pre-enriched from backend, replies lazy-loaded on expand
AgentLayout.js: Feed correctly positioned in primary navigation array between Team and Quotes
AgentHomePage.js: Control Tower implementation complete with Action Cards, KPI strip, and dedup filter on recentWork
AgentBilling.js: Sync button and duplicate Subscription Details section successfully removed
AgentSettings.js: Billing tab shows plan summary with Manage Billing redirect instead of duplicate plan grid
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 5 UX refinement complete. Feed page now loads activities correctly (N+1 query fixed). Dashboard is now a Control Tower with action cards and KPI strip. Billing UX cleaned up - no Sync button, no duplicate sections. Settings > Billing tab redirects to dedicated Billing page.

P0_feed_loading.details: Feed page loads 8 activities without infinite skeleton loading. Activities render with title, author, type badge (MESSAGE, DOCUMENT), recipients count, More/Reply buttons.

P1_feed_in_primary_nav.details: Feed link visible in main sidebar between Team and Quotes with MessageSquare icon

P1_dashboard_control_tower.details: Dashboard shows 'Control Tower' header with Action Cards (2 Change Requests, 2 Pending Invoices, 6 Pending Quotes) and KPI strip (5 Total Clients, 1 Active Projects, 32'400 Revenue CHF, 2 Approved Quotes)

P1_action_cards_clickable.details: Change Requests -> /agent/quotes, Pending Invoices -> /agent/invoices, Pending Quotes -> /agent/quotes

P2_billing_no_sync_button.details: Sync button not visible on Billing page

P2_billing_no_duplicate_subscription_det.details: 0 'Subscription Details' sections found on Billing page

P2_settings_billing_plan_summary.details: Settings > Billing tab shows Current Plan (Pro), Property Usage (4/50), and Manage Billing button

dashboard_recent_activity_deduplicated.details: 4 unique recent activity items found with no duplicate titles
